ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the college basketball team */,
  "ngames" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* The conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* The division within the conference */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* The name of the head coach */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the team's home court */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistical record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "LRMC" REAL /* The Logistic Regression Markov Chain value for the team */,
  "LRMC_rank" INTEGER /* The LRMC ranking of the team */,
  "team_index" INTEGER /* An index for the team, potentially used for sorting or other purposes */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of games won */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw shooting percentage */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal shooting percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage */,
  "strength_of_schedule" REAL /* A measure of the difficulty of the team's schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game's statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "opponent_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the opposing team */,
  "team_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the home team */,
  "opponent_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the opposing team */,
  "team_turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the home team */,
  "opponent_turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the opposing team */,
  "team_assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the home team */,
  "opponent_assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the opposing team */,
  "team_steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the home team */,
  "opponent_steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the opposing team */,
  "team_blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the home team */,
  "opponent_blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the opposing team */,
  "team_free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the home team */,
  "team_free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the home team */,
  "opponent_free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the opposing team */,
  "opponent_free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the opposing team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, fan, analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user's preferences */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "preferred_team" TEXT /* The team the user is interested in */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* How often the user wants to receive reports */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Settings for notifications (e.g., game results, team rankings) */,
  "favorite_player" TEXT /* The player the user is interested in */,
  "preferred_stat_metrics" TEXT /* The specific statistics the user is interested in (e.g., PPG, RPG, APG) */,
  "custom_report_template" TEXT /* A template for custom reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_team FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
